review_title: DeepTalk tells you what your data is really saying vs what you want it to say. Invaluable tool.
description: I have loved it. Really cool, interesting, and incredibly useful data analysis. I am using it for economic and market analysis. This is taking parts of my process to a different level. And the graphics are next level as well so they make reports looks great.
author: David T.
pros: I don investment research and I am able to feed it FOMC minutes, statements, speeches, etc. I can feed it earnings calls or anything really. It does a great job of breaking down what is being said and showing the trend over time plus so much more. I have been using it a lot and find new insight every day.
cons: this space is relatively new so I am not sure what it is lacking. The only thing it needs is an API, but I knew that coming in and it should be released to us in the next 3-6 weeks, so I dont look at it as a con.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Test your machine learning ideas quickly and easily
description: Excellent, more companies should be testing if the data and problems they have can be enhanced with machine learning. Deep Talk makes this easy.
author: Paul W.
pros: If you have some data and a problem to solve then Deep Talk is an excellent way of testing if machine learning and NLP can add value. It "understands" your data much more readily than other systems I've used and then provides a pipeline to running inference models without complex machine learning engineering.
cons: Once you've reaped that automatic benefits of Deep Talk from your data and your problem set there is no clear path forward. Typically in machine learning you establish a baseline and then iterate, through data and code, on improving that score. With Deep Talk I don't know see how this is possible as there is no export to code or export to another more customisable machine learning platform.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Experience using this Machine Learning Platform for clustering the Wine review dataset
description: I had quite nice experience with the tool. I was able to generate useful visualizations and draw actionable insights along with deriving key insights from the project results, however, I had to navigate to another platform for using sentiment analysis for the same dataset. so it was a learning experience using this platform with the provided features but also had to use more tool for doing Sentiment analysis that helped me to quickly understand the metrics for positive, negative and neutral reviews.
author: Fnu N.
pros: Topics and Subtopics related connection, Time series of the graph, Unburst chart and many more functionalities. Ease of use and User experience, easy to create projects and classify and train the model.
cons: The tool also analyzed the additional column input with the dataset which gave additional analysis for user city, manufacturer, Id, categories, etc. but they were not that refined charts, thus it was ignored for my analysis in the project. In my view, the software can further improve to understand multiple columns of data and give a proper analysis of additional columns of data. The representation of the charts for these dataset were of negligible use. The additional columns should be used to aid in the primary analysis, which I found was lacking in this platform
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Mini S.
pros: Deep Talk provides me with a lot of option of platforms that can be connected like hubspot, Zendesk etc. it also displays great infographics to help me properly visualize the data.
cons: Its a very useful and valuable tool for me.

author: Kejda G.
pros: It works well at extracting insights from unstructured text for sentiment analysis and topic clustering
cons: Relative lack of integrations — currently must import my data as CSV
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Andrew M.
pros: I have used Deep Talk and it is amazing when it comes to text mining Thanks to the AI features, it makes data analysis easy and simplifies communication understanding. I like the multiple Customer engagement features.
cons: It is a super solution and no major issues

review_title: A million use cases for a unique data analysis tool
description: Fantastic tool with a million uses. Be creative; you could start your own market research firm using this tool, scraping data for resources online and reporting on trends, sentiment, etc.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I love that Deep Talk lets you import bulk data and turn it into insights. I can pull in marketing data, book manuscripts, whatever I want, and it can report on data and trends hidden within this data.
cons: It takes a little time to understand how everything works, but it is pretty intuitive.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy solution for complex text analysis
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to use GUI and strong visualisations/drill-down.
cons: There was a service outage yesterday so none of my files would validate.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Turn common data into data that works for you
description: Would recommend it to anyone who needs to grab random data to turn it into usable data.
author: Jorge Edel A.
pros: I like turning twitter data into data that works for me. It will analyze and make a cluster of keywords that I can dig further to analyze.
cons: I think the dashboard can be improved to make it more modern. Also, they should implement webhooks and API to have data analyzed automatically.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: How to get more insights from your surveys
description: It was easy to use, straightforward and I got great insights. I found there was a keyword many students were using that was very important to add to the content of the course we deliver.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Finding the most critical points on a satisfaction survey I did from a course was straightforward. I imported the CSV with the answers and Deep Talk gave me insights into the words the students used that were most important.
cons: The user interface could be better designed.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy to use platform to discover insights in my text data
description: Great experience, we analyze thousands of surveys in just a few minutes.
author: Alexander S.
pros: How easy it was to analyze my data. I uploaded the surveys and in less than 10 minutes I got the topic classification and other metrics. Also we started training deepers to fin complaints in the surveys.
cons: The API was in beta at that moment but the support team told us they will open the API during May.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The translation quality from english to german is superb.
author: Stefan M.
pros: Easy to use, great quality of the translation
cons: Nothing so far - maybe that there are no cheaper priced packages.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
